spec_match.rationale: Demo lands on the feature surface — 4 of 5 title keywords plus 10 summary keywords appear in the page.

interactive.rationale: Insufficient interactive surface — only 0 form controls and 1465 chars of script behind them.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and concept lede share 6 keywords; the page delivers what the index promises.

edge_cases.rationale: Happy path is covered; the page does not visibly handle missing-API, empty-input, or error branches — those edges are the spec's harder territory.

references.rationale: Page links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5169937372676096 directly in the see-also / references section.

design_system.rationale: All colours flow through CSS variables, no raw hex, and button overrides keep colour and background in sync.

openQuestions.title: Add real interactive controls
openQuestions.detail: CLAUDE.md flags static code cards as the explicit anti-pattern. This concept needs a try-it surface with at least a few wired controls (inputs/selects/buttons) and a live readout of what the API returned, not just a styled snippet.

openQuestions.title: Add an explicit edge-case branch
openQuestions.detail: The page covers the happy path. Pick at least one failure mode from the spec (missing permission, empty input, unsupported value, rate-limit, etc.) and wire a button that drives the API into that branch with the resulting error / fallback shown in the page.

summary: 1 rubric fails — the open questions list the must-fix items before this page is ready to ship.
